title: Create Blockman Go-style Skyblock survival game

requirements.text: Create a 3D floating island environment using Three.js and React Three Fiber with a skybox background, starting island platform made of voxel-style blocks, and void space below
acceptanceCriteria: 3D scene renders with skybox and floating island visible
Island is composed of block-based terrain (voxel style)
Camera can view the island from multiple angles
Void/empty space is visible below the island

requirements.text: Implement first-person or third-person player character controller with WASD movement, mouse look controls, jump ability, and collision detection with blocks
acceptanceCriteria: Player can move in all directions using WASD keys
Mouse controls camera/look direction
Player can jump with spacebar
Player cannot fall through blocks or walk through solid blocks
Player falls into void if walking off island edge

requirements.text: Create block placement and breaking mechanics where players can left-click to break blocks and right-click to place blocks from inventory, with visual feedback and block selection highlighting
acceptanceCriteria: Left-clicking on a block removes it from the world
Right-clicking places a block from inventory at target position
Targeted block is highlighted/outlined when hovering
Block breaking has visual breaking animation or feedback
Placed blocks snap to grid positions

requirements.text: Implement resource gathering system where breaking blocks adds them to player inventory, including different block types (dirt, stone, wood, etc.) with distinct textures
acceptanceCriteria: Breaking blocks adds resources to player inventory
Multiple block types exist with different textures (dirt, stone, wood minimum)
Inventory displays collected resources with quantities
Backend stores player inventory state
Inventory persists across sessions

requirements.text: Create basic crafting system with crafting interface where players can combine resources to create new items or block types using recipe patterns
acceptanceCriteria: Crafting UI can be opened/closed
Players can view available recipes
Placing resources in crafting grid creates items when pattern matches
Crafted items are added to inventory
Backend validates crafting recipes and updates inventory

requirements.text: Store player world state in backend including island block composition, player position, inventory contents, and support multiple player islands
acceptanceCriteria: Backend persists block placement/removal changes
Player position is saved
Inventory state is stored in backend
Each authenticated player has their own island instance
World state loads when player returns

requirements.text: Add player authentication using Internet Identity so each player has a persistent island and inventory
acceptanceCriteria: Players can authenticate with Internet Identity
Authenticated players load their saved island and inventory
New players start with a fresh default island
Player identity is used to isolate world data

requirements.text: Design and implement a vibrant, playful visual theme with bright saturated colors, rounded block edges (soft voxel aesthetic), cheerful sky gradients, and clean UI inspired by casual mobile games like Blockman Go, avoiding blue and purple color schemes
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette uses bright, saturated colors (avoiding blue/purple)
Blocks have slightly rounded edges for softer voxel look
Sky uses cheerful gradient backgrounds
UI elements follow casual mobile game design patterns
Overall aesthetic is playful and approachable

constraints: Must use Three.js with React Three Fiber for 3D rendering
Must use Motoko for backend logic in single-actor architecture
Must use Internet Identity for authentication
Must use React with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS for UI
nonGoals: Advanced mob AI or enemy systems

required: Skybox texture with bright cheerful sky gradient suitable for voxel game (skybox.dim_2048x2048.png)
Block texture atlas showing dirt, stone, wood, and grass block faces in vibrant playful style (block-atlas.dim_512x512.png)
